events.label: assistant
events.text: Assessment written to `/app/answer.json`: the frayed/burned webbing is a **fail**, critical risk. Damaged webbing fibers compromise the energy-absorption capability of the fall arrest system, and both 1926.502 and 1910.140 require immediate removal from service for any component showing wear, cuts, or damage — this can't pass to close-out until the component is replaced and the damage source (heat/abrasion) is identified and corrected.
